pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 17 migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as a baseline; using Spring Boot 2.x with Java 17 may work but prevents access to modern features and is incompatible with the target stack.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 8 to 17 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The build will fail or produce incompatible bytecode if the source/target compatibility remains at 8 while the project intends to run on Java 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the deprecated MySQL connector artifact with the new group ID and artifact ID.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact 'mysql:mysql-connector-java' is deprecated and may not be available or compatible with newer Spring Boot 3.x dependency management; the new artifact 'com.mysql:mysql-connector-j' is the required replacement.

src/main/java/net/leozeballos/FastFood/p.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence package.
src/main/java/net/leozeballos/FastFood/p.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

src/main/java/net/leozeballos/FastFood/p.general_idea: Remove explicit @Autowired annotation from constructor to rely on Spring's implicit single-constructor injection.
